Components & Accessories

Optional modules, media, power, monitoring, rails, and lenses

The RED ONE was designed as a modular camera system.

The base body ships with a PL mount and a CF Module, but virtually everything else (storage, power, monitoring, support accessories, and lenses) is an optional add-on. This page catalogs all known accessories from the RED ONE MX era.

“Shoot lightweight EFP style (body around 10 lbs., in rugged aluminum alloy) or load it up to shoot a feature film. Options include RED-RAIL™ mounting accessories that ‘grow’ the camera body. Configure for tripod, crane or long lens applications.”

  • RED Digital Cinema, 2010
2011 prices are sourced from archived red.com store pages (late 2010 / early 2011 snapshots). 2026 prices are estimated averages from eBay sold/active listings, B&H Photo used, KEH, Adorama, MPB.com, and cinemaGear.com as of May 2026. Prices marked with * are confirmed from active listings; all others are estimates based on observed market depreciation. Actual sold prices are typically 10-30% below asking. Battery-powered items (RED BRICK) may be degraded after 12+ years; adjust value accordingly.

Photo Archive

Images recovered from the Wayback Machine (web.archive.org) circa 2010-2011. Most RED product images from this era were not crawled by the archiver; only the camera body and RED ROCKET images survived. Click any thumbnail to view the full image. If you have original RED ONE era product photos, open an issue to contribute them.

* = image source confirmed from Wayback Machine archive. Click to view full size.

Digital Storage

CF Module (CompactFlash)

The CF Module adds an in-camera CompactFlash card slot and is included with every new RED ONE purchase (+$500 included in camera price). CF cards are also used for firmware upgrades.

  • 8GB CF card ≈ 400 ft film reel equivalent (~4–5 minutes at 4K REDCODE 28)
  • 16GB CF card ≈ double the 8GB capacity
  • Maximum record resolution without speed-verified CF: 2K
Item Price (2011) Price (2026 avg)
RED CF MODULE $500 ~$45
RED CF CARD 16GB $300 ~$5
RED STATION BASE $250 ~$50
RED STATION COMPACT FLASH $250 ~$50

RED DRIVE™ (RAID)

External RAID-0 magazine housing two 2.5” 160GB laptop drives = 320GB total capacity. Approximately 2–3 hours of 4K REDCODE™ RAW footage. Mounts in RED RAIL CRADLE or directly to camera body. Connects via Drive Connector LEMO.

“Storing two to three hours of 4K REDCODE™ RAW footage on a drive smaller than an ASC manual is downright unbelievable.”

Item Price (2011) Price (2026 avg)
DRIVE CABLE (18”) $200 ~$15
DRIVE CABLE (6’) $250 ~$20

RED-RAM™

Same form factor as RED DRIVE, but using two 2.5” 64GB SSDs in RAID-0 = 128GB total. Approximately 30–40 minutes of 4K REDCODE™ RAW.

REDMAG SSD

Solid-state storage module for the RED ONE MX. Connects via the 26-pin iVDR connector on the camera body.

Size Interface Notes
128GB iVDR 26-pin SATA II internal; SiI3512 controller
256GB iVDR 26-pin Identified drive: Toshiba HG3 series THNSNC256GBSJ
Item Price (2011) Price (2026 avg)
RED STATION REDMAG 1.8” $250 ~$75
RED STATION REDMAG 2.5” $250 ~$75

Repair note: The camera validates the drive model string at boot against a hardcoded approved list. Replacement drives must match an approved model string or the firmware must be patched. See the Hardware Reference and the r1mx SSD research for details.

Power System

RED BRICK™ Battery

140Wh V-Mount battery designed specifically for the RED ONE. Approximately 2 hours charge time. Mounts via RED V-MOUNT PLATE or RED BATTERY PLATE.

RED CHARGER

Sequential V-Mount charger with 3 indicator lights per port. Can charge while connected to camera; automatically prioritises camera power. Features a small fold-out stand.

RED POWER PACK

Bundle: RED CHARGER + 2× RED BRICK batteries.

Item Price (2011) Price (2026 avg)
RED POWER PACK $1,450 ~$150
RED BRICK 140Wh $450 ~$40
RED BRICK (6-Pack) $2,100 ~$240
AC Power Adaptor (RED ONE) $135 ~$50
RED CHARGER $550 ~$35
DC POWER CABLE (10’) $150 ~$15
RED BATTERY PLATE $175 ~$25
RED CRADLE $750 ~$75
RED QUICKPLATE $500 ~$50
BATTERY BELT CLIP $290 ~$25

Monitoring Options

RED-LCD™ (5.6” Flat Panel)

High-resolution LCD monitor with advanced tools for framing, exposure, and focus. Connects via EVF/LCD cable to the camera body.

RED PRO LCD™ (7” Flat Panel)

Larger format professional LCD monitor.

BOMB EVF™

Electronic viewfinder. The BOMB EVF replaced the original RED-EVF in the MX era and provides a high-resolution electronic eyepiece.

Item Price (2011) Price (2026 avg)
BOMB EVF™ $3,200 $325 *
RED PRO LCD (7”) $2,500 $600 *
RED LCD (5.6”) $1,700 ~$175
RED ARM (5”) $120 ~$20
RED ARM (9”) $150 ~$25
EVF CABLE (2’) $180 ~$25
EVF CABLE (6’) $220 ~$25
EVF CABLE (10’) $260 ~$25
LCD CABLE (2’) $180 ~$25
LCD CABLE (6’) $220 ~$25
LCD CABLE (10’) $260 ~$25

RED-RAIL™ System

The RED-RAIL™ system allows the camera to be configured for any shooting style by redistributing weight along a central rail. The system supports shoulder-mount, tripod, crane, and long-lens configurations.

“Using the weight of the Digital Magazine and Battery on the extending rail system, you can counterbalance the weight of different lenses and accessories to match the desired balance point for optimal shooting. The RED-RAIL™ system takes the shoulder mount to the next level, with infinite flexibility.”

Rail Components

Item Price (2011) Price (2026 avg)
BASE PRODUCTION PACK $1,250 ~$100
RED HANDLE - LEFT $250 ~$35
RED HANDLE - RIGHT $250 ~$35
RED HANDLE MOUNT $150 ~$20
TOP MOUNT $250 ~$30
TOP HANDLE $150 ~$30

SIDE HANDLE $200 ~$35

RED QUICKPLATE $500 ~$50

Lens Mounts

The standard RED ONE ships with a PL Mount (ARRI-compatible). Alternative lens mounts are available as drop-in replacements.

Item Price (2011) Price (2026 avg)
RED ONE NIKON MOUNT $500 ~$100
B4 TO PL ADAPTOR $3,500 ~$600
PL MOUNT TORX+ HARDWARE KIT $15 ~$5
NIKON MOUNT TORX+ HARDWARE KIT $15 ~$5
REAR LENS CAP, PL $25 ~$5

RED Lenses

RED 18-50mm f/2.8 CF Zoom Lens

Specification Value
Focal length 18–50mm
T Stop range T3–T22
Maximum f/stop f/2.8
Close focus (from front) 1.73 inches
Length (front to image plane) 6.16 inches
MOD 8 inches
Maximum format Super 35mm
Diagonal AOV (30mm circle) 75.72°–31.27°
Iris rotation 48°
Focus rotation (∞ to MOD) 175°
Zoom rotation 51°
Front diameter 4.5 inches
Weight 1.05 kg / 2.3 lbs
Item Price (2011) Price (2026 avg)
RED ZOOM 18-50mm T3 $3,995 ~$750

RED PRO PRIME Lenses (ARRI PL Mount)

All primes: T1.8–T22, 32mm image diagonal, 100 lp/mm center / 63 lp/mm edge resolution.

Focal Length H×V FOV (Super 35mm) MOD Weight Price (2011) Price (2026 avg)
18mm 58.8°×31.1° 4” 6.45 lbs $4,750 ~$1,400
25mm 55.8°×31.1° 4” 6.16 lbs $4,250 ~$1,400
35mm 41.4°×22.5° 4” 6.07 lbs $4,250 ~$1,500
50mm 28.3°×15.7° 6” 4.53 lbs $4,250 ~$1,400
85mm 16.3°×9.2° 18” 4.20 lbs $4,250 ~$1,400
100mm 15.1°×8.0° 24” 4.39 lbs $4,250 ~$1,400
300mm T2.9 5.83°×2.92° 7.36’ 5.67 lbs $5,950 ~$2,000
Item Price (2011) Price (2026 avg)
RED PRO PRIME SET (I), 5 primes (18, 25, 35, 50, 85mm) $19,000 ~$8,000 *

Miscellaneous Accessories

Item Price (2011) Price (2026 avg)
BRANDED CAMERA CASE $600 ~$100
RED PRO LENS COMPACT CASE $575 ~$75
RED CAMBOOK $425 ~$150
RED ONE BODY CAP $12 ~$5

MITCHELL BASE MOUNT $230 ~$50
BALL ADAPTOR (150mm) $195 ~$30
BALL ADAPTOR (100mm) $195 ~$30
FOCUS HOOK SET $45 ~$10

RED ROCKET™ (Post Production Accelerator)

The RED ROCKET is a PCIe x16 accelerator card for real-time decode and debayer of 4K R3D files. Not part of the camera system, but an essential part of the original RED ONE workflow.

Specification Value
Interface PCIe x16 (x8 lanes minimum)
Platform Mac, PC (XP SP2+), Linux (Red Hat)
RAM 2048 MB
Capability Real-time 4K / 5K R3D decode and debayer
Output Full quality 4K DVI; 2K/1080p via Dual Link HD-SDI
Audio 48kHz, 24-bit embedded
Price new (2011) $4,750
Price refurbished (2011) $3,000
Price used (2026 avg) $125 *
RED ROCKET BREAKOUT BOX (2011) $1,200
RED ROCKET BREAKOUT BOX (2026 avg) ~$75

This site is an independent community reference for educational purposes, repair, and obsolescence management of discontinued RED ONE MX cameras. It is not affiliated with or endorsed by RED Digital Cinema.

RED®, RED ONE®, REDCODE®, MYSTERIUM-X™, RED BRICK®, RED-DRIVE®, RED-RAM®, RED ROCKET™, REDCINE-X™, BOMB EVF™, and RED RAILS™ are trademarks of RED.COM, LLC.
